scene_title: Coracao humano carmesim vs cerebro dourado com circuitos
narrative_beat: Alvo do Genesis e alvo do Apocalipse lado a lado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid split composition showing anatomically detailed crimson human heart on left representing Genesis DNA target and luminous golden human brain with digital circuits on right representing Apocalypse mind target in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the split between the crimson heart and the golden brain with digital circuits
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated neuroscience laboratory seen from above in background
props: luminous golden brain with digital circuits

environment.location: laboratory of human biology and digital neuroscience

composition.foreground: heart and brain in vivid crimson gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson-gold split grading

mood.emotion: same enemy two different weapons across two testaments

symbolism.primary: Genesis targeted the body — Revelation targets the mind
symbolism.secondary: brain circuits as the new DNA corruption, silicon as new fallen flesh

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
